name: Peptidings
description: A peer-reviewed-quality publication on therapeutic peptides. The institutional center of the portfolio.

name: Blue Amp Media
description: Progressive Democratic political media — YouTube channel @Cliffs_Edge, the Blue Letter newsletter, podcasts. With founder Cliff Schecter.

description: Personal Substack. Essays on pivot moments in politics, technology, and culture; near-future scenarios; speculative fiction; The Shattered World Series.

name: The Imagination Project
description: Futuretypes — a personality-archetype quiz built on literary archetypes rather than pop psychology.

name: PepDoc
description: Documentary film and companion book about building Peptidings with Claude as an integrated executive partner. In production.

name: GenXy
description: Generational-politics community and podcast. The Daily Whatever Show with Dana DuBois (best friend of 47 years).
